name: Cultural Competence CME Workbook
description: Physical workbook for the Cultural Competence in Mental Health Care CME course. Sold at speaking events and conferences. 80 pages, spiral-bound.

name: Bell Behavioral Health New Patient Intake Packet
description: Complete new patient intake packet including consent forms, HIPAA notice, mental health history questionnaire, and insurance authorization. Office use only — not for retail sale.

name: DSM-5-TR Quick Reference Laminated Card
description: Durable laminated quick-reference card summarizing DSM-5-TR diagnostic criteria for common psychiatric disorders. Sold at speaking events and conferences.

name: PMHNP Board Prep Study Guide Vol. 1
description: Comprehensive physical study guide for the PMHNP-BC board certification exam. Covers psychopharmacology, psychotherapy modalities, diagnostic reasoning, and practice questions. Vol. 1 of 2.

name: Cultural Formulation Interview Pocket Guide
description: Compact pocket-sized booklet containing the DSM-5 Cultural Formulation Interview (CFI) framework, supplementary modules, and clinician prompts. Designed for use during patient assessments.

name: PMHNP Board Prep Study Guide Vol. 2
description: Companion physical study guide for the PMHNP-BC board certification exam. Covers neurobiology, lifespan considerations, ethics, and full-length timed practice exams. Vol. 2 of 2.

name: Psychopharmacology Dosing Quick Reference Card
description: Laminated quick-reference card with starting and target dosing for SSRIs, SNRIs, antipsychotics, and mood stabilizers. Sold at conferences and CME events.

name: Intergenerational Trauma Clinician Workbook
description: Spiral-bound workbook accompanying Karen Bell's seminar on intergenerational trauma in underserved communities. 96 pages with case studies and reflection prompts.

name: Cultural Competence CME Course Registration
description: Registration for the live Cultural Competence in Psychiatric Practice CME course. Includes 6 contact hours, course materials, and certificate of completion.

name: Speaking Engagement Booking Deposit
description: Non-refundable booking deposit to reserve Karen Bell, PMHNP-BC for a keynote or workshop on culturally responsive psychiatric care. Balance invoiced separately.

name: Reducing Stigma in Underserved Communities Field Guide
description: Pocket field guide for community health workers on reducing psychiatric stigma. Developed with NAMI Florida outreach programs. 48 pages.

name: CFI Pocket Guide Classroom Bundle (10-Pack)
description: Bundle of ten Cultural Formulation Interview Pocket Guides for PMHNP student cohorts. Sold to NSU faculty and clinical preceptors at a per-unit discount.

name: Telepsychiatry Workflow Pocket Guide
description: Compact guide covering telehealth consent, mental status exam adaptations, and documentation for remote psychiatric visits. Sold at conferences.

name: Bell Behavioral Health New Patient Intake Packet (Spanish)
description: Spanish-language new patient intake packet including consent forms, HIPAA notice, and mental health history questionnaire. Office use only — not for retail sale.

name: Release of Information Authorization Form
description: HIPAA-compliant release of information authorization form for coordinating care with outside providers. Office use only — not for retail sale.

name: PHQ-9 / GAD-7 Screening Pad (50 Sheets)
description: Tear-off screening pad combining PHQ-9 depression and GAD-7 anxiety scales for in-office administration. Office supply — not for retail sale.

name: Cultural Competence CME Workbook (Digital PDF)
description: Downloadable PDF edition of the Cultural Competence CME Workbook. Delivered by email after purchase at speaking events and online.

name: PMHNP Board Prep Study Guide Two-Volume Bundle
description: Discounted bundle of PMHNP Board Prep Study Guide Vol. 1 and Vol. 2. Most popular study product at board review events.

name: Mental Status Exam Quick Reference Card
description: Laminated reference card outlining the components of a complete mental status examination. Sold at conferences and to PMHNP students.

name: Clinical Supervision Consultation (Per Hour)
description: One hour of clinical supervision consultation for PMHNP students and early-career nurse practitioners. Provided by Karen Bell, PMHNP-BC.

name: Bell Clinical Press Conference Tote Bag
description: Cotton canvas tote bag with the Bell Clinical Press logo. Given or sold at speaking engagements and CME conferences.
